title: Phunware Q4 Revenue Growth and AI Hospitality Focus
text: Phunware Q4 Revenue Growth and AI Hospitality Focus. Key Highlights: Phunware (NASDAQ:PHUN) reported strong fourth-quarter performance, with net revenue jumping 33% to $0.8 million for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company demonstrated significantly improved profitability, with gross margins expanding to 57.7% from 23.3% year-over-year. The software platform company is strategically repositioning itself around artificial intelligence and the hospitality sector. The company is increasingly focusing on the multi-billion-dollar hospitality industry, where it has launched new product tiers aimed at luxury hotel brands and independent full-service properties. AI-Powered Solutions: Central to this transformation is Phunware's AI Concierge product, now commercially available following a pilot program. The platform combines conversational AI with real-time navigation capabilities, enabling personalized guest recommendations and directions within hotel properties. Financial Performance: While full-year 2025 revenue declined to $2.6 million from $3.2 million (attributed to weakness in advertising markets), the company's net loss narrowed to $2.1 million from $2.6 million. Phunware concluded the year with $100.6 million in cash and cash equivalents. Interim CEO Jeremy Krol emphasized the company's commitment to hospitality-focused AI solutions as a driver of future growth.
